в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Git (text) + DVC    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (binary artifacts)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  + Git tags          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (snapshots)         в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Three Data Flows

1. **Code вҶ’ Docs:** File watch вҶ’ AST parse вҶ’ chunk вҶ’ embed вҶ’ index вҶ’ agent generates doc
2. **Conversations вҶ’ Decisions:** Chat captured вҶ’ raw log вҶ’ LLM distills вҶ’ decisions extracted вҶ’ living doc updated
3. **Everything вҶ’ History:** Every action appends to `events.jsonl` вҶ’ git tags mark snapshots вҶ’ temporal queries over history


### Three Operating Modes

- **Self-mode:** Corvia indexes its own monorepo (dogfooding)
- **Target-mode:** End user opens their project, Corvia creates `.corvia/` and indexes it
- **Dual-mode:** Corvia dev uses VS Code Extension Development Host (two windows)

---
